evals.prompt: Generate an AI Displacement Risk report for my role as a senior financial analyst in New York.
evals.expected_output: Lists report types, selects AI Displacement Risk, collects inputs, confirms 15 credit cost, generates report, polls every 30s, downloads and presents PDF.

assertions.name: lists_types
assertions.description: Calls ceevee_list_report_types to discover available types

assertions.name: confirms_cost
assertions.description: Shows credit cost and confirms before generating

assertions.name: generates_report
assertions.description: Calls ceevee_generate_report with correct type and inputs

assertions.name: downloads_pdf
assertions.description: Calls ceevee_download_report to retrieve the PDF
